title: Seeded Dimensions
description: Adds a config to set per-dimension seeds!
body:
# Seeded Dimensions - ![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/seeded-dimensions)
This mod simply adds in a config to set the seed per-dimension.

## Config
```json
// Located at config/seeded-dimensions.json
{
  "minecraft:overworld": "default",
  "minecraft:the_nether": "default",
  "minecraft:the_end": "default"
  // "NAMESPACE:DIMENSION": 2
}
```
You can add any dimension to this list, use "default" to use the default config file seed, or set a number for a custom seed.

If you run `/execute in ...` it will auto-fill what dimensions exist, that tag shown is the tag that should be in the config here.

## Example
![Example of mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dak4GhGX/images/246e87a7c3a5309aace2a064fd590605541a2285.png)
